function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_aes_kat.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_aes_kat
description: >
  Verifies the AES hardware accelerator of mspm33c321a_derivative using
  NIST FIPS-197 known-answer tests (KATs) for AES-128 ECB encrypt/decrypt,
  AES-256 ECB encrypt, AES-128 CBC encrypt, DMA-assisted bulk encryption,
  and done-interrupt generation.
checklist_ids:
  - AES-01
  - AES-02
  - AES-03
  - AES-04
  - AES-05
  - AES-06
test_names:
  - test_aes128_ecb_encrypt_kat
  - test_aes128_ecb_decrypt_kat
  - test_aes256_ecb_encrypt_kat
  - test_aes128_cbc_encrypt
  - test_aes_dma_bulk
  - test_aes_done_irq
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

aes_test_vectors:
  - name: aes128_ecb_encrypt
    key_bits: 128
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    key:        [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
                 0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    plaintext:  [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
                 0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    ciphertext: [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
                 0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
  - name: aes256_ecb_encrypt
    key_bits: 256
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    key:        [0x60, 0x3D, 0xEB, 0x10, 0x15, 0xCA, 0x71, 0xBE,
                 0x2B, 0x73, 0xAE, 0xF0, 0x85, 0x7D, 0x77, 0x81,
                 0x1F, 0x35, 0x2C, 0x07, 0x3B, 0x61, 0x08, 0xD7,
                 0x2D, 0x98, 0x10, 0xA3, 0x09, 0x14, 0xDF, 0xF4]
    plaintext:  [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
                 0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    ciphertext: [0xF3, 0xEE, 0xD1, 0xBD, 0xB5, 0xD2, 0xA0, 0x3C,
                 0x06, 0x4B, 0x5A, 0x7E, 0x3D, 0xB1, 0x81, 0xF8]

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; AES engine in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_aes
    key_bits: 128
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    irq_enable: done
    description: Configure AES for AES-128 ECB encryption with done IRQ enabled
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write_aes_key
    key: [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
          0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    description: Load AES-128 key from FIPS-197 Appendix B
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write_aes_plaintext
    data: [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
           0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    description: Load plaintext block into AES input register
  - step: 5
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: AES0
    register: CR
    value: START_BIT
    description: Start AES encryption
  - step: 6
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 22
    timeout_cycles: 500
    description: Wait for AES done IRQ (IRQ22)
  - step: 7
    action: apb_read_check_aes_output
    expected: [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
               0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
    description: Read AES output register; compare against FIPS-197 expected ciphertext
  - step: 8
    action: apb_configure_aes
    key_bits: 128
    mode: ECB
    operation: DECRYPT
    description: Reconfigure for AES-128 ECB decryption
  - step: 9
    action: apb_write_aes_key
    key: [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
          0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    description: Reload key for decryption
  - step: 10
    action: apb_write_aes_plaintext
    data: [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
           0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
    description: Load ciphertext as decrypt input
  - step: 11
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: AES0
    register: CR
    value: START_BIT
    description: Start AES decryption
  - step: 12
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 22
    timeout_cycles: 500
    description: Wait for AES done IRQ
  - step: 13
    action: apb_read_check_aes_output
    expected: [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
               0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    description: Verify decrypted output recovers original plaintext
  - step: 14
    action: run_aes256_ecb_kat
    vector: aes256_ecb_encrypt
    description: Configure AES-256 ECB encrypt KAT and verify ciphertext
  - step: 15
    action: configure_aes_cbc
    key_bits: 128
    iv: [0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04, 0x05, 0x06, 0x07,
         0x08, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x0B, 0x0C, 0x0D, 0x0E, 0x0F]
    description: Configure AES-128 CBC mode with standard IV
  - step: 16
    action: aes_dma_bulk_encrypt
    src_addr: 0x20000000
    dst_addr: 0x20001000
    length_bytes: 256
    dma_channel: 5
    description: Load 256-byte plaintext at 0x20000000; DMA through AES to 0x20001000

checks:
  - id: CHK-AES-01
    checklist_id: AES-01
    description: AES-128 ECB encryption output matches FIPS-197 expected ciphertext
    expected: Output == [0x3A,0xD7,0x7B,0xB4,...]
  - id: CHK-AES-02
    checklist_id: AES-02
    description: AES-128 ECB decryption of ciphertext recovers original plaintext
    expected: Output == [0x6B,0xC1,0xBE,0xE2,...]
  - id: CHK-AES-03
    checklist_id: AES-03
    description: AES-256 ECB encryption output matches FIPS-197 expected ciphertext
    expected: Output == [0xF3,0xEE,0xD1,0xBD,...]
  - id: CHK-AES-04
    checklist_id: AES-04
    description: AES-128 CBC chained blocks produce correct output per NIST SP 800-38A
    expected: CBC ciphertext matches reference
  - id: CHK-AES-05
    checklist_id: AES-05
    description: DMA-assisted 256-byte AES encryption produces correct ciphertext
    expected: Destination buffer matches reference AES-encrypted source
  - id: CHK-AES-06
    checklist_id: AES-06
    description: AES done IRQ (IRQ22) fires within 100 cycles of operation start
    expected: IRQ asserts; DONE flag set in AES STATUS register

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-AES checks PASS
  - All KAT vectors match bit-exactly
  - No AES engine hang or timeout
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_aes_kat
description: >
  Verifies the AES hardware accelerator of mspm33c321a_derivative using
  NIST FIPS-197 known-answer tests (KATs) for AES-128 ECB encrypt/decrypt,
  AES-256 ECB encrypt, AES-128 CBC encrypt, DMA-assisted bulk encryption,
  and done-interrupt generation.
checklist_ids:
  - AES-01
  - AES-02
  - AES-03
  - AES-04
  - AES-05
  - AES-06
test_names:
  - test_aes128_ecb_encrypt_kat
  - test_aes128_ecb_decrypt_kat
  - test_aes256_ecb_encrypt_kat
  - test_aes128_cbc_encrypt
  - test_aes_dma_bulk
  - test_aes_done_irq
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

aes_test_vectors:
  - name: aes128_ecb_encrypt
    key_bits: 128
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    key:        [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
                 0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    plaintext:  [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
                 0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    ciphertext: [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
                 0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
  - name: aes256_ecb_encrypt
    key_bits: 256
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    key:        [0x60, 0x3D, 0xEB, 0x10, 0x15, 0xCA, 0x71, 0xBE,
                 0x2B, 0x73, 0xAE, 0xF0, 0x85, 0x7D, 0x77, 0x81,
                 0x1F, 0x35, 0x2C, 0x07, 0x3B, 0x61, 0x08, 0xD7,
                 0x2D, 0x98, 0x10, 0xA3, 0x09, 0x14, 0xDF, 0xF4]
    plaintext:  [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
                 0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    ciphertext: [0xF3, 0xEE, 0xD1, 0xBD, 0xB5, 0xD2, 0xA0, 0x3C,
                 0x06, 0x4B, 0x5A, 0x7E, 0x3D, 0xB1, 0x81, 0xF8]

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; AES engine in idle state
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_aes
    key_bits: 128
    mode: ECB
    operation: ENCRYPT
    irq_enable: done
    description: Configure AES for AES-128 ECB encryption with done IRQ enabled
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write_aes_key
    key: [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,
          0xAB, 0xF7, 0x15, 0x88, 0x09, 0xCF, 0x4F, 0x3C]
    description: Load AES-128 key from FIPS-197 Appendix B
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write_aes_plaintext
    data: [0x6B, 0xC1, 0xBE, 0xE2, 0x2E, 0x40, 0x9F, 0x96,
           0xE9, 0x3D, 0x7E, 0x11, 0x73, 0x93, 0x17, 0x2A]
    description: Load plaintext block into AES input register
  - step: 5
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: AES0
    register: CR
    value: START_BIT
    description: Start AES encryption
  - step: 6
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 22
    timeout_cycles: 500
    description: Wait for AES done IRQ (IRQ22)
  - step: 7

    expected: [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
               0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
    description: Read AES output register; compare against FIPS-197 expected ciphertext
  - step: 8

    key_bits: 128
    mode: ECB
    operation: DECRYPT
    description: Reconfigure for AES-128 ECB decryption
  - step: 9

    key: [0x2B, 0x7E, 0x15, 0x16, 0x28, 0xAE, 0xD2, 0xA6,

    description: Reload key for decryption
  - step: 10
    action: apb_write_aes_plaintext
    data: [0x3A, 0xD7, 0x7B, 0xB4, 0x0D, 0x7A, 0x36, 0x60,
           0xA8, 0x9E, 0xCA, 0xF3, 0x24, 0x66, 0xEF, 0x97]
    description: Load ciphertext as decrypt input
  - step: 11
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: AES0
    register: CR
    value: START_BIT
    description: Start AES decryption
  - step: 12
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 22
    timeout_cycles: 500

    iv: [0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04, 0x05, 0x06, 0x07,
         0x08, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x0B, 0x0C, 0x0D, 0x0E, 0x0F]
    description: Configure AES-128 CBC mode with standard IV
  - step: 16

    src_addr: 0x20000000
    dst_addr: 0x20001000
    length_bytes: 256
    dma_channel: 5
    description: Load 256-byte plaintext at 0x20000000; DMA through AES to 0x20001000

checks:
  - id: CHK-AES-01
    checklist_id: AES-01
    description: AES-128 ECB encryption output matches FIPS-197 expected ciphertext
    expected: Output == [0x3A,0xD7,0x7B,0xB4,...]
  - id: CHK-AES-02
    checklist_id: AES-02
    description: AES-128 ECB decryption of ciphertext recovers original plaintext
    expected: Output == [0x6B,0xC1,0xBE,0xE2,...]
  - id: CHK-AES-03
    checklist_id: AES-03
    description: AES-256 ECB encryption output matches FIPS-197 expected ciphertext
    expected: Output == [0xF3,0xEE,0xD1,0xBD,...]
  - id: CHK-AES-04
    checklist_id: AES-04
    description: AES-128 CBC chained blocks produce correct output per NIST SP 800-38A
    expected: CBC ciphertext matches reference
  - id: CHK-AES-05
    checklist_id: AES-05
    description: DMA-assisted 256-byte AES encryption produces correct ciphertext
    expected: Destination buffer matches reference AES-encrypted source

    checklist_id: AES-06
    description: AES done IRQ (IRQ22) fires within 100 cycles of operation start
    expected: IRQ asserts; DONE flag set in AES STATUS register

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-AES checks PASS
  - All KAT vectors match bit-exactly
  - No AES engine hang or timeout
